name: Abhinav Parameshwaran
title: AI Engineer
summary: AI Engineer with 3+ years of experience building and deploying LLM applications, RAG pipelines, and scalable ML systems for researcher-facing and production environments. Experienced in developing AI workflows across heterogeneous datasets, with strong background in retrieval systems, model evaluation, inference services, and large-scale data pipelines. Skilled in Python, LangGraph, Pinecone, AWS, and end-to-end AI system development with a focus on reliability, performance, and usability.

experience.title: AI Engineer
experience.company: Keck School of Medicine of USC
bullets: Built and deployed an LLM-based reasoning system to extract contextual insights from heterogeneous datasets, supporting downstream analytical workflows for researchers.
Designed a LangGraph-based orchestration workflow to coordinate retrieval, reasoning, and multi-step task execution across researcher-facing AI pipelines.
Built a RAG pipeline using Pinecone and optimized embedding/retrieval workflows to improve semantic search relevance and retrieval precision across lab data sources.
Developed and deployed a low-latency inference service to support internal AI workflows, improving response speed and throughput for researcher-facing applications.
Architected a 10TB+ data processing pipeline for ML and analytics workloads, improving computational efficiency by 40%.
Implemented evaluation, monitoring, and data-quality workflows for RAG and ML outputs, reducing false positives by 99% and improving system reliability.
Developed an anomaly detection model for system monitoring, achieving 92% recall and enabling earlier issue detection in lab workflows.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Deployed ML inference services on AWS SageMaker and AWS Lambda to serve 1M+ daily requests in production.
Built an NLP-based document processing pipeline that automated information extraction with 95% accuracy.
Developed a speech recognition workflow for voice-driven applications, achieving 88.6% accuracy.
Engineered real-time streaming and ingestion pipelines for ML applications, maintaining 99.9% availability and reducing latency by 35%.
Optimized backend services, reducing response time by 200 ms for downstream applications and inference workloads.

projects.name: Multi-Agent Trip Concierge & Logic Supervisor
projects.description: Built a supervised multi-agent system using Python, LangGraph, and Pinecone to ingest unstructured chat logs. Implemented RAG-based reasoning to resolve scheduling conflicts under venue constraints.

projects.name: AI Teaching Assistant
projects.description: Built a multi-agent chatbot using RAG and Pinecone to support course-content Q&A through a React frontend. Tuned chunk size, Top-K, and temperature to improve RAG retrieval and response quality.

projects.name: Social Media Engagement Prediction (DUNEs of Influence)
projects.description: Designed a deep learning model to predict social media engagement, outperforming baseline models by 25%. Trained the model on a custom dataset of Elon Musk's tweets and related Reddit posts.
